title: 1051699 Maxtra Pro All-in-1 Filter Jug 3.6 L with Cartridge
features: Maxtra Pro water filter featuring unique BRITA MicroFlow technology - our most powerful water filtration system for hard and soft water areas. Use it for hot and cold drinks
COOL FORMAT - Fits your fridge door
The BRITA Smart Light LED indicates in time when the filter needs to be replaced (depending on the time and amount of water)
It is dishwasher safe (except BRITA Smart Light)
BRITA PerfectFit for optimal filtration. Ensures all water is reliably filtered when using a MAxtra Pro water filter
description: BRITA · European quality · Water filter · Filter jug · Filter cartridges · Filter cartridges · Filters limescale and limescale deposits. Simply fill it under the tap and BRITA filters out limescale and other taste and odor disturbing substances. Your household appliances also benefit from this BRITA fresh water: descaling is practically not necessary. your home. A MAXTRA PRO filter cartridge lasts 4 weeks or 150 litres of delicious filtered water. Replace it in time and always enjoy perfectly filtered water.
